body.title: Utility closet bootstrap script
body.result: utility_closet.sh created: self-installs system deps, auto-detects .env (handles Igor-wild-0001 case), validates env vars, bootstraps DB schema, launches tmux session. --dry-run + --no-launch flags. Tested: exit 0. Pushed 7db6fa0b.
body.description: Self-installing bootstrap for Igor's infrastructure. Handles: (1) verify/install system deps (postgres, ollama, tmux, ssh); (2) DB schema bootstrap so Igor can start; (3) env var validation + guided setup; (4) launch tmux session others can attach to. New file: claudecode/utility_closet.sh or .py. NO HIGH inertia files touched. Tests: --dry-run mode + manual checklist. Logging: logcmd/logecho akientools convention. Scope OUT: dashboard extraction, MCP server migration, brainstem/cognition changes. D307.
